name: GitHub pilot cross-repo — frozen jina-embeddings-v2-base-code (code + embed-tuned)
hypothesis: Does a TRUE code-EMBEDDING base (loaded under a pinned transformers<5 env) beat the general substrate on frozen cross-repo retrieval (Q6 finish)?
command: uv pip install --python .venv-r15b 'transformers>=4.40,<5' && .venv-r15b/bin/python data/pilot/embed_code3_pinned.py && python data/pilot/run_code3_ablation.py
leakage_checks: frozen embeddings; references scrubbed; cross-repo split.
known_limitations: Pilot scale; frozen (no fine-tune). Exploratory. The code-embedding base required a pinned transformers<5 env to load (remote code).
